programme.title: Day 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour – Miami Beach Round 2026
programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour Miami Beach 2026 brings elite show jumping to a spectacular seaside setting, with the world’s top riders and horses competing across multiple classes. The highlight is the Grand Prix, where precision, speed and technique are key. Set against the iconic Miami skyline, the event combines top-level sport with a unique atmosphere on one of the Tour’s most distinctive stages.

programme.title: HL H.H.the Father Amirs prix 2026 -Faults & time 1.45– Week 4
programme.desc: A major international championship with 240 male and female riders from elite levels, representing 32 countries.

programme.title: Team – Round 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The GCL Team Round 1 opens the Rome leg at the Foro Italico. Two riders per squad chase fast, fault-free trips to set the overnight order and carry scores into Round 2. Expect tight time allowed, flowing lines, and smart tactics on stride counts and anchor placement as title contenders push for pole.

programme.title: CSI5 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: Top combinations tackle elite CSI5* classes at the Foro Italico. A technical track, tight time allowed and related lines test precision and power, with the fastest clears advancing to a jump-off. Expect fine margins, inside turns and bold strides as riders chase ranking points and momentum for the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Playoffs SF Leg 1 - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Team - Round 2 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The decisive GCL Team Round 2. Reverse-order start from Round 1, with every rail and second counting toward the combined team total. Strategic rider swaps and cool heads over a technical track shape the podium and precious championship points in a high-stakes Roman finish.

programme.title: Team - Round 2 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The decisive GCL Team Round 2. Reverse-order start from Round 1, with every rail and second counting toward the combined team total. Strategic rider swaps and cool heads over a technical track shape the podium and precious championship points in a high-stakes Roman finish.

programme.title: Grand Prix of Rome - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The 1.60m LGCT Grand Prix: one round plus jump-off for big championship points and a golden ticket to the Prague Playoffs Super Grand Prix. Huge oxers, delicate verticals and a demanding time allowed reward brave riding and perfect stride control in a high-stakes Roman finale.

programme.title: Salon VIP - Magazine 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football, Sport magazine. Interviews exclusives de joueurs et temoignages de supporters passionnes : plongez dans les coulisses du football avec des points de vue d'inities, des histoires inedites et des debats enflammes autour du ballon rond. Host: Claire Arnoux.

programme.title: Doc Presidents Proprietaires La Fin D Une Ere - Football 2024
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Un regard dans les coulisses du quotidien des proprietaires de clubs du championnat de France, entre passion du jeu, enjeux financiers et incertitudes qui influencent leurs choix.

programme.title: Ep 31 Inside Fra - This is Paris - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Suivez de pres le parcours du Paris Saint-Germain avec une couverture complete des dernieres infos, des resultats et des prochains rendez-vous, alors que le club emblematique continue de marquer l'histoire de la Ligue 1 depuis 1974.

programme.title: Bayern vs Real Madrid - Champions League - QR - Football 2025-2026

programme.title: Marseille vs Metz - Ligue 1 - J29 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Une couverture en direct de la premiere ligue professionnelle de football en France, ou vingt equipes determinees s'affrontent dans des matchs electrisants pour decrocher le titre national tant convoite.

programme.title: Arthur Fils (FRA) vs Brandon Nakashima (USA) - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
programme.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. Featuring a 32-player singles draw, it offers around €2.8m in prize money, with top-ranked players competing for 500 ranking points ahead of the major clay-court tournaments.

programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Miami P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1
programme.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.

programme.title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City since a 2-1 away win in May 2021. Manchester City have won four of their last five away Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 26 league visits to Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: This will be the sixth time that Atlético Madrid and Barcelona have faced each other this season, which is their most meetings in a single campaign since 2013-14. Only in 1985-86 have they faced more than six times in the same season. As well as a 2-0 win in the first leg, Atlético Madrid have also beaten Barcelona 4-0 in the Copa Del Rey this season. They last beat them three times in the same campaign back in 1995-96.

programme.title: San Lorenzo (ARG) vs Deportivo Cuenca (ECU) - Conmebol Sudamericana Group Stage
programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage from South American of the Copa Sudamericana.

programme.title: Aston Villa - Bologna - QF2 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Aston Villa have kept five consecutive home clean sheets against Italian clubs in major European competition – the last player to score at Villa Park for an Italian team was Zbigniew Boniek in a 2-1 Juventus win in the European Cup in March 1983. Since beating West Brom 3-1 at the Hawthorns in March 1967, Bologna have lost their five away visits to England in all European competition. They’ve lost to Leeds, Fulham, Liverpool and Aston Villa twice.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. programme.title: Boca Juniors (ARG) vs Barcelona (ECU) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: FC Machida Zelvia (JPN) vs Al Ittihad (KSA) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - QF
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on beIN

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. programme.title: Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: None of the seven meetings between Liverpool and Paris SG in all competitions have been drawn, with two of the Reds’ three wins coming at home. Paris SG won 1-0 at Anfield in the UEFA Champions League last 16 last season. The only sides to win consecutive away games against Liverpool in European competition are Barcelona and Atalanta, with neither of those doing so in back-to-back campaigns.

programme.title: Al Ahli vs Al Rayyan - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W5
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Dunkirk - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1
programme.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

programme.title: Flavio Cobolli (Ita) vs Vit Kopriva (Cze) - Day 5 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events.
